remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature card in exile with a memory counter on it
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Until your next turn, target legendary creature you control becomes a copy of target creature card in exile with a memory counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one target legendary creature card from a graveyard with a memory counter on it.
